ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the game is played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team for the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss and score) */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks made by the team */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Total tackles made by the team */,
  "forced_fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of forced fumbles during the game */,
  "fumble_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of fumble recoveries during the game */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs, championship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in kg) */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the player's contract */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's stats entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the stats are recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose stats are recorded */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks made by the player in the game */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Total tackles made by the player in the game */,
  "forced_fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of forced fumbles by the player in the game */,
  "fumble_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of fumble recoveries by the player in the game */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player in the game */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards achieved by the player in the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards achieved by the player in the game */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards achieved by the player in the game */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role/title of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Defensive Coordinator) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style of the coach (e.g., aggressive, defensive-minded) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the coach (e.g., playing experience, coaching history) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the analysis is conducted */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game performance */,
  "strengths" TEXT /* Identified strengths of the team's performance */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* Identified weaknesses of the team's performance */,
  "time_of_possession" TEXT /* Time of possession by the team during the game */,
  "turnover_differential" INTEGER /* Turnover differential for the team during the game */,
  "analyst_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_analysis_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* Focus area of the training (e.g., offense, defense, special teams) */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Intensity level of the training session (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the injury occurrence */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain, concussion) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of recovery in days */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., recovered, ongoing) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "rehabilitation_progress" TEXT /* Rehabilitation progress of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Total ties by the team in the season */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed by the team */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards achieved by the team */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards achieved by the team */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards achieved by the team */,
  "team_rating" TEXT /* Overall rating of the team's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES games ("date")
)
